title: Irish Chicken Skewers
description: A fusion of Irish flavors with the convenience of grilled skewers, featuring tender chicken drumsticks marinated in a mixture of herbs and spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together whiskey (if using), fermented soy sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the marinade and toss to coat.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Thread the marinated chicken drumsticks onto skewers.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 12-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the internal temperature reaches 165°F.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and garnish with chopped parsley.
